items.caption: An advertisement for a home that utilizes natural gas for various purposes. the home features a large pool, a well-lit patio with a gas grill and a gas fireplace, and a gas tankless water heater. the house is illuminated by gas lighting, and there is a gas generator for backup power. the gas range, gas water heater, and gas furnace are also highlighted as features of the home. the text "natural gas in the home" is prominently displayed at the top of the image, emphasizing the theme of the ad.
